name: Sam's Fans Drop
description: An exclusive piece dropping in collaboration with Sam's Fans. 100% of profits support music and art therapy for seriously ill children and their families.
charity_description: Sam's Fans is an Ohio-based non-profit organization that supports and enhances music and art therapy programs for seriously ill children and their families.

name: LSS Choices Drop
description: An exclusive piece from our collaboration with LSS Choices. 100% of profits help provide safe haven and crisis support for victims of domestic violence.
charity_description: LSS Choices for Victims of Domestic Violence provides a 24-hour crisis line, emergency shelter, and counseling to interrupt the cycle of domestic violence in central Ohio.
